lanes.name: agent-sdk-hardening
lanes.prompt: Harden the Go agent SDK to production grade across many sessions: add streaming backpressure handling, provider timeout/retry policy, and an integration test matrix across the fake/claude/codex/openai adapters. Work the full Explore -> Research -> Plan -> Implement -> Verify -> Test -> Commit loop, checkpointing PROGRESS.md as you go.

lanes.name: lane-docs
lanes.prompt: Keep a short human-facing notes doc for the agent SDK hardening lane. Docs only; no code.
